acquisition method: Data-dependent Top 10 CID MS and MS/MS data were acquired
alkylation reagent: alkylated with 55 mM iodoacetamide for 20 min
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 55 mM iodoacetamide for 20 min
fragmentation method: Data-dependent Top 10 CID MS and MS/MS data were acquired
instrument: coupled to a LTQ-Orbitrap Velos (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
labeling: mass spectrometry proteomics data was deposited to the ProteomeXchange Consortium
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol for 30 min
reduction concentration: reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol for 30 min
